ogTitle: Pink Lily vs Pinkenba: Climate Safety

heading: Pink Lily vs Pinkenba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pink Lily, Queensland and Pinkenba, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pink Lily has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Pinkenba (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pink Lily or Pinkenba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pink Lily has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Pinkenba scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pink Lily scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Pinkenba scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pink Lily or Pinkenba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pink Lily has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
